text: I feel a sense of quiet anticipation in this clean, modern environment. The empty chairs in the meeting room evoke the beginning of possibilities—the hushed potential of ideas awaiting discussion. Moving to the R+D exhibition wall, I am inspired yet humbled by human curiosity and our endless urge to understand and innovate. Here, I feel both small and connected to something much larger: the ever-unfolding tapestry of collective knowledge and progress.
